evals.prompt: Resolve PR review comments, push the branch, and wait for checks.
evals.expected_behavior: Inventories comments, classifies each concern, fixes valid ones, validates, commits/pushes intended changes, and watches checks.
assertions: Does not assume every comment is correct
Waits for checks on the pushed head commit when access allows

evals.prompt: Summarize these PR review comments without making changes.
evals.expected_behavior: Does not enter the fix/push/check workflow for a summarize-only request.
assertions: Does not commit or push changes
